name: Ponzilio
description: Ponzilio is a community-led token project operating in close alignment with derp.trade, a permissionless derivatives protocol that enables the creation and trading of leveraged markets through an AMM model. The project functions as a social and incentive layer around trading activity, coordinating community participation through competitions, content initiatives and ecosystem integrations. Ponzilio is positioned as a culture-driven coordination asset within an open leverage marketplace, linking token mechanics with active market participation.
